overview: VenIQ Media LLP — a visually stunning digital growth agency website with 3D hero scenes, animated pages, dark mode, blog, portfolio, and a consultation booking system. Built for hospitals, doctors, clinics, and modern businesses in India.
features: 3D animated hero with floating laptop, phone, and orbiting social icons
9 public pages: Home, About, Services (overview + 6 detail pages), Blog, Business Hub, Portfolio
Dark mode toggle with localStorage persistence
Framer Motion scroll animations and page transitions
Sticky responsive navbar with services dropdown and mobile drawer
Blog listing and blog post pages with category filtering
Stats counters with viewport-triggered count-up animation
